Settings.Title: Contour Region Settings
Settings.ContourIncrementHint: Elevation change per contour band (e.g. 5 for 5ft steps).
Settings.CellResolutionHint: Pixel size per heightmap cell. Smaller values produce smoother terrain.
Settings.ConvertConfirm: This will delete existing Contour Region regions and recreate them. Continue?
Settings.ClearConfirm: This will erase all painted elevation data. Continue?

Notifications.TerrainMapperMissing: Contour Regions: TerrainMapper module is not active. Regions will be created without plateau behaviors.
